migrationStatusRefresh95Gates: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=['docs/backend-python-sliderule-v5-runtime-closure-95.md','docs/backend-python-blueprint-v5-adjacent-runtime-95.md','docs/backend-python-production-wiring-reality-95.md']; for (const p of files) { const s=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'); if(!s.includes('95')) throw new Error('missing 95 report content: '+p); } const status=fs.readFileSync('agent-loop/tasks/sliderule-python-migration-status.md','utf8'); if(!status.includes('95')) throw new Error('migration status was not refreshed for 95 stage');"

migrationStatusRefreshOverall95Gates: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const status=fs.readFileSync('agent-loop/tasks/sliderule-python-migration-status.md','utf8'); for (const needle of ['整体 NodeJS 后端','95','Blueprint','Auth','Audit','Task lifecycle','Web AIGC']) { if(!status.includes(needle)) throw new Error('migration status missing overall-95 evidence wording: '+needle); }"
